results.title: Frisco to choose first new mayor in nine years
results.description: Voters will choose between retired construction business owner Rod Vilhauer and former Frisco ISD board trustee Mark Hill.

results.title: Tug strengthens leadership team
results.description: London-based marketing agency Tug has appointed Asher Gordon as managing director for EMEA following a period of sustained growth and a series of major client wins. Asher joins from dentsu X, where he most recently served as managing partner. He brings more than 15 years of experience across performance marketing, digital media... Read more
